class.name: TrackRenderer
class.brief_description: A high-performance C++ track rendering engine for libmaszyna.
class.description: [TrackRenderer] is a specialized node designed for efficient rendering of railway tracks. It uses the [RenderingServer] directly to manage geometry instances, bypassing the SceneTree overhead. It supports GPU-based vertex deformation for rails, multimesh instancing for sleepers, and dynamically generated ballast geometry. It also provides server-side collision generation for performance-critical track segments.

method.name: get_ballast_mesh_instance
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the ballast mesh instance managed by the [RenderingServer].

method.name: get_instance_rid
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the rail mesh instance (alias for [method get_rail_mesh_instance]).

method.name: get_rail_mesh_instance
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the rail mesh instance managed by the [RenderingServer].

method.name: get_sleeper_mesh
method.description: Returns the [Mesh] currently used for sleepers.

method.name: get_sleeper_multimesh_instance
method.description: Returns the [RID] of the sleeper multimesh instance managed by the [RenderingServer].

method.name: set_ballast_texture
method.description: Sets the texture for the ballast by its path relative to the MaSzyna game directory.

method.name: set_sleeper_e3d
method.description: Links this renderer to an [E3DModelInstance] to extract its mesh and use it as a template for sleepers.

method.name: set_sleeper_mesh
method.description: Directly sets the [Mesh] to be used for sleeper instances.

method.name: update_ballast_mesh
method.description: Regenerates the ballast geometry based on the provided track [param length] and [param curve_precision].

method.name: update_rail_mesh
method.description: Regenerates the rail geometry (Vignoles profile) based on the provided [param length], [param rail_spacing] (gauge), and [param curve_precision].

method.name: update_track_data
method.description: Uploads path data ([param points] and [param quats]) to the GPU for real-time vertex deformation of rails and placement of sleepers.

members.member: If [code]true[/code], the ballast geometry is rendered.
The vertical height (thickness) of the ballast bed.
Tiling factor for the ballast texture along the track length.
Vertical offset of the ballast bed relative to the track curve.
Global UV scaling for the ballast texture.
Tiling factor for the ballast texture across the track width.
If [code]true[/code], physical collision geometry for the rails is generated in the [PhysicsServer3D].
The distance between the two rails (track gauge).
